title: device.rs pcr_read: magic 11 for TPM_ALG_SHA256
description: In wolftpm/src/device.rs line 115, the literal 11 is passed as the hash algorithm ID to wolfTPM2_ReadPCR, with only a comment saying '// TPM_ALG_SHA256 = 11'. The bindgen output exports TPM_ALG_ID_T_TPM_ALG_SHA256; using it would catch any value drift at compile time and make the intent clear without requiring a reader to cross-reference the TPM spec.
